code: export class BulkFurnitureFloorRemoveParser{constructor(){this._items=[];}flush(){this._items=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;const count=wrapper.readInt();this._items=new Array(count);for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const itemIdStr=wrapper.readString();const isExpired=wrapper.readBoolean();const userId=wrapper.readInt();const delay=wrapper.readInt();this._items[i]={itemId:parseInt(itemIdStr,10)||0,isExpired,userId,delay};}return true;}get items(){return this._items;}}
